svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 544px; height: 1px; padding-top: 29px; margin-left: 291px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #A3EA2A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: "Source Sans Pro"; color: #A3EA2A; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1050px; height: 1px; padding-top: 72px; margin-left: 58px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 17px; font-family: "Source Sans Pro"; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
line-height: 170%;

span.style: color: light-dark(rgb(163, 234, 42), rgb(25, 86, 0)); background-color: transparent; line-height: 170%;

div.span: -a always,exit -S execve -F exe=/usr/bin/wget -F key=proc_wget # Log execution of "wget" command (execve syscall)
# Log access to the "/secret.thm" file (openat syscall)

font.span:
-a always,exit -S openat -F dir=/etc/ssh -F perm=w -F key=file_sshconf # Log file changes in the "/etc/ssh" directory (perm=write)
-a always,exit -S connect -F exe=/usr/bin/python3.12 -F key=net_python

div.span: # Log network connections made by the Python process
